description_long: This is a large commercial passenger airplane, specifically an Airbus A380, characterized by its double-deck fuselage and four underwing turbofan engines. The fuselage is predominantly white with blue accents, including a blue tail fin marked with 'A380' and the Airbus logo. The wings are long and slightly swept, featuring upward-angled winglets at the tips for aerodynamic efficiency. The airplane has a conventional tail design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is located at the forward section of the upper deck, with multiple windows visible. The landing gear is not visible in these images, suggesting it is either retracted or not modeled.
description: A large, double-deck Airbus A380 passenger airplane with four underwing turbofan engines, white and blue livery, and swept wings with winglets.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, four engines, and the blue tail fin with 'A380' marking.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wingspan, upward-angled winglets, and the single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the engines, fuselage, and tail details from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the nose, cockpit windows, and the arrangement of the four engines under the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, long swept wings with upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows on the upper deck.
